metadata.description: MCPCentral plugins: MCP server discovery, local content extraction with model routing, identity, LLM model registry, personal knowledge graph, sandboxed execution + decks, and end-to-end research workflows

plugins.name: mcpcentral
plugins.description: MCP server discovery (mcp-registry), universal local content extraction with runtime model routing (totext-local), and identity introspection (whoami)

plugins.name: llm-info
plugins.description: Live LLM model registry skills: pick the right model, plan migrations, estimate cost, and digest the latest releases. Wraps mcpcentral-llm-info.

plugins.name: totext-graph
plugins.description: Personal document knowledge-graph skills: research-graph, entity-dossier, citation-tracer, knowledge-onboard. Wraps mcpcentral-totext-cloud.

plugins.name: office-sandbox
plugins.description: Sandboxed Ubuntu container (Python/Node/git) and PowerPoint template engine. Wraps mcpcentral-office.

plugins.name: research-suite
plugins.description: End-to-end cross-server workflows: research-deck (graph → model picker → .pptx) and ai-news-brief (latest models → digest → optional library storage). Wraps mcpcentral-llm-info, mcpcentral-totext-cloud, and mcpcentral-office.
